Meeting Briefing

FreeAgent 9 Pilot

Kyle Cabezas Status Update
Overview

FreeAgent 9 Pilot is an AI concierge assistant for mortgage professionals. Currently serving Kyle Cabezas (Branch Manager, Rapid Mortgage Cincinnati) via SMS powered by Twilio. All AI responses generated by Claude Haiku for cost efficiency.

Live Features
12 Active Capabilities
01
Morning Briefing
Automated daily briefing at 7 AM
02
Mortgage Guidelines
FHA, Conv, VA, USDA lookups
03
Rate Tracking
Manual rate logging + briefing refs
04
Food Delivery
DoorDash, UberEats + 18 chains
05
Amazon Shopping
Product search links
06
Grocery Delivery
Kroger, Instacart
07
Reminders
"Remind me to call the Garcias at 3pm"
08
Note-taking
"Note: Williams appraisal at 340k"
09
Script Help
Role-play borrower conversations
10
Social Media
Ghostwrite rate/market posts
11
Weather
Cincinnati weather in briefings
12
General Q&A
Anything else, powered by Claude
Status
Known Challenges
SMS Delivery (10DLC)
Outbound messages blocked (error 30034). Carrier registration (10DLC) in progress — takes 1-3 business days. Inbound replies work fine via TwiML.
Response Quality
Stress tested 18/20 PASS. Amazon/food intent conflict FIXED. Grocery response enrichment in progress.
Morning Briefing
Initially perceived as "going rogue" — actually a designed feature. Preserved and working as intended.
Roadmap
What's Next
Phase 1 — Now
Deep-Link Concierge
DoorDash, Amazon, Instacart direct links. One text, one tap.
Phase 2 — Next
Full DoorDash Ordering
Uber Consumer Delivery API integration. Application submitted.
Phase 3 — Future
Payment Integration
Stripe tokenization for secure transactions.
Phase 4 — Vision
Full Concierge
Kyle says what he wants, Pilot makes it happen. Food delivered, packages ordered, groceries at the door.
Live Demo
Demo Script
"help"
Returns full feature menu
"What is the FHA minimum credit score?"
Instant mortgage guideline answer
"Order me a pizza"
DoorDash + chain links for nearby pizza
"Remind me to call the Garcias at 3pm"
Confirmation + reminder set
"Write me a social media post about rates"
Ready-to-post content generated
Architecture
Technical Stack
Node.js
Server (port 3472)
Twilio
SMS Webhook
Claude Haiku
AI Engine
12 Handlers
Intent Pipeline
Profile System
Conversation Memory
Interaction Log
QC Tracking
9 Enterprises
